calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Continued To Jul-24-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Daniel Stern, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Ying Lam, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Souleiman Ghali as follows:
Principal $39,000.00
Interest $6,000.00
Attorenys fees $1,637.50
Costs $500.00 for a total of $47,137.50
Judgment signed in open court.
